overview.description: The Chesapeake Trend-Following Fixed Income ETF (TFFI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund, aiming to provide exposure to US and foreign fixed income securities through a long-term trend following program. TFFI was launched on Feb 23, 2026 and is issued by Chesapeake.
